content:
Audit  ivx ia chat end to end and fix sync for deployment now, IVX DEPLOYMENT V3 — CREDENTIAL SYNC + ENTERPRISE DEPLOYMENT ENGINE

Repository:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

MISSION

Synchronize every deployment credential automatically and transform IVX into an enterprise deployment engine.

RULE #1

DO NOT ask for credentials first.

Assume credentials already exist in one of these locations:

• GitHub Secrets
• Render Environment Variables
• IVX Secure Variables
• Runtime Environment
• Production Environment
• Existing deployment configuration

Attempt to load and validate them before reporting anything.

========================================

STEP 1 — AUTO DISCOVERY

Search automatically for:

GitHub Token

Render API Key

Render Service ID

Repository

Branch

Supabase URL

Supabase Service Key

OpenAI Key

AWS credentials

Cloudflare credentials

Stripe keys

Email provider

SMS provider

========================================

STEP 2 — VERIFY

Do NOT trust configuration.

Actually test.

GitHub
✓ Read repository
✓ Read latest commit
✓ Push permission
✓ Workflow access

Render
✓ Read service
✓ List deployments
✓ Trigger deploy
✓ Read deploy logs

Supabase
✓ Read tables
✓ Insert test
✓ Delete test
✓ RLS verification

Production
✓ /health
✓ /version
✓ /chat
✓ /members
✓ registration
✓ login

========================================

STEP 3 — SELF REPAIR

If any credential fails:

Determine the reason:

• Missing
• Wrong name
• Wrong scope
• Expired
• 401
• 403
• Binding failure
• Runtime loading failure

Attempt automatic repair.

Only request owner assistance after a real verification proves it cannot be repaired automatically.

========================================

STEP 4 — DEPLOYMENT ENGINE

Build a deployment engine capable of:

✓ GitHub push
✓ Automatic Render deployment
✓ Deployment verification
✓ Rollback
✓ Health verification
✓ Commit verification
✓ Deployment history
✓ Automatic retries
✓ Production verification
✓ Auto rollback if deployment fails
✓ Deploy evidence generation

========================================

STEP 5 — LIVE EVIDENCE

Every deployment must produce:

GitHub SHA

Render Deploy ID

Render Commit SHA

Production Commit SHA

Build Time

Health Status

Deploy Duration

Deployment Logs

Rollback Status

Production URL

Evidence JSON

Evidence PDF

========================================

STEP 6 — AUTONOMOUS MODE

IVX must continuously:

Monitor GitHub

Monitor Render

Monitor Production

Monitor Supabase

Detect deployment failures

Retry automatically

Detect stale production

Deploy latest commit

Verify production

Report only verified facts

========================================

STEP 7 — HONEST REPORTING

NEVER report:

COMPLETE

DEPLOYED

VERIFIED

unless every check is proven.

Otherwise report:

LOCAL ONLY

UNVERIFIED

BLOCKED

WAITING

========================================

FINAL OUTPUT

Repository
Branch
GitHub HEAD SHA
Production SHA
Render Deploy ID
Commit Match
Deployment Status
Credential Status
Health Status
Registration Status
Chat Status
Supabase Status
Errors
Blockers
Next Automatic Action

Continue working automatically until every production verification passes.
